title: Rig Relay Coordination Task Event
description: Schema for coordination.task_status events emitted by the task tool. Each event represents a state transition in a subagent task lifecycle: running → completed/failed.

session_id.description: Parent orchestrator session ID that owns this task

task_id.description: Subagent task session ID — unique identifier for this subagent run

task_type.description: Type of subagent that was spawned (cartographer, architect, executor, critic, validator, stress, etc.)

agent_name.description: Agent name or type that ran the task

changed_at.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this status transition occurred
